b:Tfe6,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State <strong>two</strong> bottom-up factors affecting algal blooms.</p>
<p><img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain how top-down factors control algal blooms.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T454,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>minerals<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>nutrients<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>phosphorus<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>nitrogen</p>
<p><em>Award <strong>[1]</strong> to any two factors stated.</em></p>
<p><em>Accept abiotic factors such as temperature, light, pH, CO<sub>2</sub> concentration.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the herbivores / «first» consumers regulate algal bloom</p>
<p>b. predators of the herbivores help regulate algal bloom/reduce herbivore abundance/OWTTE</p>
<p>c. overfishing/death of predators/decreased reproduction of predators decreases algal bloom as herbivore population increases/OWTTE</p>
<p><em>Accept vice versa for marking point c.</em></p>
<p>d. habitat degradation can decrease algal bloom</p>
<p>e. pathogens of algae will decrease algal bloom<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>alien/invasive species may compete for habitat and affect algal bloom/OWTTE</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"16N.3.HL.TZ0.17"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"16N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-5-population-ecology"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
